# Amazon Q Business API Reference

## Service Endpoints

### QBusiness
- Fully managed, generative-AI powered enterprise chat assistant
- Key Capabilities: Question-answering, knowledge discovery, writing email messages, summarizing text, drafting document outlines, brainstorming ideas

### QApps
- Web experience feature within Amazon Q Business
- Allows creation of lightweight, purpose-built AI apps
- Use cases: Marketing content generation, customer email writing, promotional content creation

## Documentation Resources
- Amazon Q Business User Guide
- Overview of Amazon Q Business API operations
- IAM roles for Amazon Q Business
- Setting up for Amazon Q Business
- Amazon Q Business CLI Reference
- Amazon Q Apps capabilities
- Overview of Amazon Q Apps API operations
- IAM role for Amazon Q Business web experience including Amazon Q Apps
